# ctrader-ts — TypeScript Client for cTrader Open API

> Unofficial community library. Not affiliated with Spotware.
> Protocol: JSON WebSocket on port 5036 (demo.ctraderapi.com / live.ctraderapi.com).

## Quick Start

```ts
import { connect } from "ctrader-ts";

const ct = await connect(); // reads ~/.config/ctrader-ts/config.json + env vars, connects, authenticates
const pos = await ct.buy("EURUSD", { lots: 0.1, sl: { pips: 50 }, tp: { equity: 0.02 } });
await ct.close(pos.positionId);
ct.disconnect();
```

Credentials resolution order: stored config → env vars (CTRADER_CLIENT_ID, CTRADER_CLIENT_SECRET, CTRADER_ACCESS_TOKEN, CTRADER_ACCOUNT_ID, CTRADER_ENVIRONMENT) → overrides passed to `connect()`.

## Architecture

```
connect()            → CTrader (high-level, human-friendly)
  └─ CTrader
       ├─ connection   → CTraderConnection (WebSocket, heartbeat, reconnect, auto-retry)
       └─ raw
            ├─ auth    → CTraderAuth (app/account auth, token management)
            ├─ trading → CTraderTrading (order CRUD, execution events)
            ├─ account → CTraderAccount (balance, history, margin)
            └─ market  → CTraderMarket (symbols, spots, trendbars, depth)
```

Most users only need `connect()` + `CTrader` methods. The `raw.*` modules are for advanced/low-level use.

## Key Concepts

- **Volume**: The high-level API uses lots (0.01, 0.1, 1.0). The protocol uses units (1 lot = 100,000 units). Use `lotsToUnits()` / `unitsToLots()` for conversion.
- **SL/TP**: Specified as `{ pips: N }`, `{ dollars: N }`, or `{ equity: fraction }`. The library auto-converts to protocol-level relative values.
- **Symbol resolution**: Pass symbol names ("EURUSD") or numeric IDs. Names are resolved via an internal cache.
- **Position IDs**: Every `buy()`/`sell()` returns the real cTrader `positionId`. Use it for `modify()`, `resize()`, `close()`.
- **Prices**: Raw protocol prices are integers (divide by 10^digits for decimal). SpotPrice events include pre-computed `bidDecimal`/`askDecimal`.
- **Timestamps**: All timestamps are Unix milliseconds.
- **Auto-retry**: Rate-limit errors (REQUEST_FREQUENCY_EXCEEDED) are automatically retried with exponential backoff (up to 3 retries). No user code needed.
- **Enriched types**: `getState()` returns positions with computed `volumeInLots` and `entryPrice`. `getTrader()` returns `leverage` as a clean number (e.g. 100, 200, 500).

## CTrader — High-Level API

### Account

| Method | Returns | Description |
|--------|---------|-------------|
| `getState()` | `AccountState` | Complete snapshot: balance, equity, margin, P&L, positions (with volumeInLots, entryPrice), orders. **Call this first.** |
| `getTrader()` | `EnrichedTrader` | Account profile with computed `leverage` field (e.g. 100, 200, 500) |
| `getPositions(returnProtectionOrders?)` | `{ positions, orders }` | All open positions and pending orders |
| `getDeals(opts?)` | `{ deals, hasMore }` | Deal history. Accepts `{ from?, to?, maxRows? }`. Defaults to last 24h. |
| `getDealsByPosition(positionId, from?, to?)` | `Deal[]` | Deals for a specific position |
| `getDealOffsets(dealId)` | `{ offsetBy, offsetting }` | Deal offset links |
| `getOrders(opts?)` | `{ orders, hasMore }` | Order history. Accepts `{ from?, to? }`. Defaults to last 24h. |
| `getCashFlow(from, to)` | `DepositWithdraw[]` | Deposit/withdrawal history (max 7 days) |
| `getExpectedMargin(symbol, volumesInLots[])` | `{ margins, moneyDigits? }` | Margin estimate before trading |
| `getUnrealizedPnl()` | `{ pnls, moneyDigits }` | Unrealised P&L for all positions |
| `getDynamicLeverage(leverageId)` | `DynamicLeverage` | Dynamic leverage tiers |
| `getMarginCalls()` | `MarginCall[]` | Margin call thresholds |
| `updateMarginCall(marginCall)` | `void` | Update a margin call level |
| `watchState(handler, opts?)` | `() => Promise<void>` | Stream live account state. Fires handler on every change (execution, balance, margin, spot). Returns unsubscribe fn. |

### Trading

| Method | Returns | Description |
|--------|---------|-------------|
| `buy(symbol, opts)` | `Position` | Market buy. Returns opened position. |
| `sell(symbol, opts)` | `Position` | Market sell. Returns opened position. |
| `buyLimit(symbol, opts)` | `ExecutionEvent` | Limit buy (fills at limitPrice or better) |
| `sellLimit(symbol, opts)` | `ExecutionEvent` | Limit sell |
| `buyStop(symbol, opts)` | `ExecutionEvent` | Stop buy (triggers at stopPrice) |
| `sellStop(symbol, opts)` | `ExecutionEvent` | Stop sell |
| `stopLimit(symbol, tradeSide, opts)` | `ExecutionEvent` | Stop-limit order |
| `modify(positionId, { sl?, tp? })` | `void` | Modify SL/TP on an open position. Preserves existing SL/TP when only one is changed. |
| `resize(positionId, newLots)` | `ExecutionEvent \| undefined` | Change position volume to a new target |
| `close(positionId, { lots? }?)` | `ExecutionEvent` | Close position (full or partial) |
| `closeSymbol(symbol)` | `ExecutionEvent[]` | Close all positions on a symbol |
| `closeAll()` | `ExecutionEvent[]` | Close every open position |
| `modifyOrder(orderId, params)` | `void` | Modify a pending order |
| `cancelOrder(orderId)` | `void` | Cancel a pending order |

### Market Data

| Method | Returns | Description |
|--------|---------|-------------|
| `getSymbols(includeArchived?)` | `LightSymbol[]` | All available symbols (cached) |
| `getSymbolDetails(symbolsOrIds[])` | `FullSymbol[]` | Full symbol details: spread, swap, commission, schedule |
| `getSymbolInfo(symbol)` | `FullSymbol` | Single symbol convenience — same as getSymbolDetails but for one symbol |
| `refreshSymbols()` | `void` | Force-refresh the symbol cache |
| `watchSpots(symbols[], handler)` | `() => Promise<void>` | Stream live bid/ask. Returns unsubscribe fn. |
| `watchDepth(symbols[], handler)` | `() => Promise<void>` | Stream level 2 / depth-of-market. Returns unsubscribe fn. |
| `getTrendbars(symbol, params)` | `{ trendbars, hasMore }` | Historical OHLCV candles |
| `getTickData(symbol, params)` | `{ ticks, hasMore }` | Historical tick data |

### Events

All return an unsubscribe function `() => void`.

| Method | Event Type | When |
|--------|-----------|------|
| `onExecution(handler)` | `ExecutionEvent` | Order fill, cancel, modification |
| `onOrderError(handler)` | `OrderErrorEvent` | Order rejection |
| `onTrailingSLChanged(handler)` | `TrailingSLChangedEvent` | Trailing SL price moved |
| `onTraderUpdated(handler)` | `TraderUpdatedEvent` | Balance/equity/settings change |
| `onMarginChanged(handler)` | `MarginChangedEvent` | Position margin update |
| `onMarginCallTrigger(handler)` | `MarginCallEvent` | Margin call threshold crossed |
| `onSymbolChanged(handler)` | `SymbolChangedEvent` | Symbol metadata changed |
| `onDepth(handler)` | `DepthEvent` | Order book update |
| `onClientDisconnect(handler)` | `ClientDisconnectEvent` | Server dropped connection |
| `onTokenInvalidated(handler)` | `TokenInvalidatedEvent` | Access token invalidated |
| `onAccountDisconnect(handler)` | `AccountDisconnectEvent` | Account disconnected by server |

### Live Streaming

```ts
// watchState() — real-time account state, no polling
const stop = await ct.watchState((state) => {
  // state: LiveAccountState = AccountState + { reason, timestamp }
  // reason: "init" | "execution" | "trader_updated" | "margin_changed" | "spot"
  console.log(state.equity, state.unrealizedPnl, state.positions.length);
});
await stop(); // cleanup

// Throttle spot-triggered updates (default 500ms)
const stop2 = await ct.watchState(handler, { throttleMs: 1000 });
```

Combines EXECUTION_EVENT (position changes), TRADER_UPDATED_EVENT (balance), MARGIN_CHANGED_EVENT (margin), and SPOT_EVENT (live prices for PnL). All push-based, no polling.

### Connection

| Property/Method | Type | Description |
|----------------|------|-------------|
| `state` | `ConnectionState` | Current: "connected" / "connecting" / "reconnecting" / "disconnected" |
| `isConnected` | `boolean` | True when WebSocket is open |
| `setAccount(accountId)` | `void` | Switch account without reconnecting |
| `disconnect()` | `void` | Close connection, stop reconnecting |
| `connection` | `CTraderConnection` | Raw WebSocket connection |

## MarketOrderOptions

```ts
{
  lots: number;               // Volume in lots (0.01, 0.1, 1.0)
  sl?: SlTpSpec;              // Stop loss
  tp?: SlTpSpec;              // Take profit
  trailingStopLoss?: boolean; // Enable trailing SL
  guaranteedStopLoss?: boolean;
  label?: string;             // Bot label
  comment?: string;           // Trade comment
  clientOrderId?: string;     // Your tracking ID
}
```

## SlTpSpec — Three Ways to Specify SL/TP

```ts
{ pips: 50 }        // 50 pips from entry (symbol-aware: handles JPY, gold, etc.)
{ dollars: 25 }     // Risk/reward exactly $25
{ equity: 0.02 }    // Risk 2% of account equity
```

## Enriched Types

### EnrichedPosition (returned by getState())

Extends `Position` with computed convenience fields:
- `volumeInLots: number` — Volume in lots (e.g. 0.01, 0.1, 1.0)
- `entryPrice: number | undefined` — Same as `position.price`, provided for clarity

### EnrichedTrader (returned by getTrader())

Extends `Trader` with:
- `leverage: number | undefined` — Clean leverage ratio (e.g. 100, 200, 500). Computed from `leverageInCents / 100`.

## Error Handling

```ts
import { CTraderError, RequestTimeoutError, NotConnectedError } from "ctrader-ts";

try {
  await ct.buy("EURUSD", { lots: 0.1 });
} catch (e) {
  if (e instanceof CTraderError) {
    e.code;                // Machine-readable error code string
    e.description;         // Human-readable description
    e.hint;                // Actionable recovery hint (e.g. "Run `ctrader-ts auth` to re-authenticate")
    e.isAuthError;         // Token expired, not authenticated, etc.
    e.isRateLimit;         // REQUEST_FREQUENCY_EXCEEDED — auto-retried, only thrown after 3 failures
    e.isMaintenance;       // Server under maintenance — try later
    e.retryAfter;          // ms to wait (rate limit only)
    e.maintenanceEndTimestamp; // Unix ms when maintenance ends
  }
  if (e instanceof RequestTimeoutError) { /* request took too long */ }
  if (e instanceof NotConnectedError) { /* WebSocket not connected */ }
}
```

Error messages include actionable hints for common issues (auth failures, rate limits, invalid volumes, market closed, etc.).

## Reconnection & Auto-Retry

- **Connection**: Automatic reconnect with exponential backoff (2s → 60s max). Re-authenticates and restores subscriptions.
- **Rate limits**: Automatic retry with exponential backoff (1s → 4s, up to 3 retries). Uses `retryAfter` from server when available.

No user action needed for either.

## Enums (commonly used)

| Enum | Values | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `TradeSide` | BUY, SELL | Trade direction |
| `OrderType` | MARKET, LIMIT, STOP, STOP_LIMIT, MARKET_RANGE | Order type |
| `TrendbarPeriod` | M1, M2, M3, M4, M5, M10, M15, M30, H1, H4, H12, D1, W1, MN1 | Candle period |
| `QuoteType` | BID, ASK | Price type for tick data |
| `ExecutionType` | ORDER_FILLED, ORDER_REPLACED, ORDER_CANCELLED, etc. | What happened in execution |
| `PositionStatus` | OPEN, CLOSED, CREATED, ERROR | Position lifecycle |
| `OrderStatus` | ACCEPTED, FILLED, REJECTED, EXPIRED, CANCELLED | Order lifecycle |
| `AccountType` | HEDGED, NETTED, SPREAD_BETTING | Account mode |
| `AccessRights` | FULL_ACCESS, CLOSE_ONLY, NO_TRADING, NO_LOGIN | Account access level |
| `TimeInForce` | GOOD_TILL_DATE, GOOD_TILL_CANCEL, IMMEDIATE_OR_CANCEL, FILL_OR_KILL | Order duration |

## Utility Functions

| Function | Signature | Description |
|----------|-----------|-------------|
| `lotsToUnits(lots)` | `(number) → number` | Convert lots to protocol units (× 100,000) |
| `unitsToLots(units)` | `(number) → number` | Convert protocol units to lots (÷ 100,000) |
| `pipsToRelative(pips, pipPosition?)` | `(number, number?) → number` | Convert pips to protocol relative SL/TP units |

## CLI

```bash
ctrader-ts auth                                    # Interactive OAuth setup
ctrader-ts state                                   # Account snapshot
ctrader-ts positions                               # Open positions
ctrader-ts buy EURUSD 0.1 --sl-pips 50             # Market buy
ctrader-ts sell USDJPY 0.1 --sl-dollars 30         # Market sell
ctrader-ts close 12345678                           # Close position
ctrader-ts close 12345678 --lots 0.05               # Partial close
ctrader-ts modify 12345678 --sl-pips 30             # Modify SL/TP
ctrader-ts resize 12345678 0.2                      # Resize position
ctrader-ts watch EURUSD GBPUSD                      # Live prices
ctrader-ts bars EURUSD H1 2024-01-01 2024-12-31    # Historical candles
ctrader-ts symbols                                  # List all available symbols
ctrader-ts symbol-info EURUSD                       # Full details for a symbol
ctrader-ts state --json                             # JSON output for piping
```

## File Structure

```
src/
├── index.ts          — Package entry point, re-exports everything
├── connect.ts        — connect() convenience function (auth + connect in one call)
├── client.ts         — CTrader class (high-level API with human-friendly units)
├── connection.ts     — CTraderConnection (WebSocket, heartbeat, reconnect, auto-retry)
├── config.ts         — Credential resolution (file → env → overrides)
├── symbol-cache.ts   — Symbol name → ID resolution cache
├── helpers.ts        — SL/TP spec resolution (pips/dollars/equity → protocol values)
├── errors.ts         — CTraderError (with actionable hints), RequestTimeoutError, NotConnectedError
├── enums.ts          — All protocol enums (PayloadType, OrderType, TradeSide, etc.)
├── types.ts          — All TypeScript interfaces (Position, EnrichedPosition, Order, Deal, events, etc.)
└── modules/
    ├── auth.ts       — CTraderAuth (app auth, account auth, token ops)
    ├── trading.ts    — CTraderTrading (order CRUD, execution events)
    ├── account.ts    — CTraderAccount (balance, history, margin)
    └── market.ts     — CTraderMarket (symbols, spots, trendbars, depth)

examples/
├── basic-trade.ts     — Open, modify, close a position
├── watch-and-trade.ts — Stream prices and react to conditions
└── portfolio-report.ts — Account state and position report

cli/
└── index.ts          — CLI entry point (commander-based)
```
